title: spathelia subintegra
intro: Spathelia subintegra, a plant species native to tropical Africa, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spathelia subintegra include its potential to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, this plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices, and is also used in the production of essential oils and traditional medicine.
